case_title: VINCENT AGOSTA VS. BANK OF AMERICA

STIPULATION FOR JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-08-2017 - APPEARANCE BY BOTH PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. AFTER HEARING, MATTER IS TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC. 8, 2017 BY JPT JASON JUNGREIS. NO EXHIBIT DETAINED.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-08-2017 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AGOSTA, VINCENT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA $100.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $100.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED NO EXHIBITS FILED
